docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ABDUL AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER, JOHN SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TUCKER, JOHN

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIULATION. PLAINTIFF, ABDUL SHAIKH IS AWARDED JUDGMENT OF $1,314.47 BACK RENT. THIS SHALL BE PAID IN BI-MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100 OR $200 A MONTH UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT IS PAID. THIS AMOUNT IS TO BE PAID WITHIN A SIX MONTH PERIOD ENDING 9-23-94. CURRENT RENT OF $400 A MONTH SHALL BE PAID BEGINNING 4-1-94 AND ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH OR AT THE RATE OF $200 EVERY TWO WEEKS, BEGINNING 4-1-94. IF PAYMENTS ARE MAINTAINED AS AGREED, NO ACTION SHALL BE TAKEN. IF DEFENDANT, JOHN TUCKER, DOES NOT MAINTAIN THE AGREED UPON PAYMENTS, PLAINTIFF ABDUL SHAIKH SHALL SEEK A WRIT OF POSSESSION ON AN EX PARTE BASIS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUCKER, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: SESTRI HOTEL, 1411 STOCKTON STREET, ROOM 120, SAN FRANCISCO $1,314.47 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,314.47, LEASE FORFEITED
